title: [synthetic-rds] Replication Lag And High CPU On analytics-prod

commonAnnotations.summary: ReplicaLag on analytics-prod-replica-1 exceeded 1000 seconds. CPUUtilization is also elevated at 75–85%, suggesting potential resource contention.
commonAnnotations.error: Replication lag and elevated CPU detected simultaneously. Root cause unclear.
commonAnnotations.suspected_symptom: Read replica is returning stale data. Analytics dashboards show data from 20 minutes ago.
